description: Accounts in Hebrew and eastern Arabic numerals. Dated: 5554 and 5555 AM, corresponding to 1793–95 CE. Very neat handwriting. Currencies: real, medin. Mentioning many of the surnames of traders familiar from this period: Alarcon, Shtiwi, Condiote, many more.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
